PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(YEAR(?date) AS ?year) WHERE {
  ?superbowl wdt:P31 wd:Q222004 ; wdt:P168 wd:Q175137 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 1
